narrative:
22 Ohio House district has 82,347 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 2.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 39.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 36.8 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +10.0% D−R vs +54.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
